nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: GET https://n8n.tebita.com/webhook/feature-gif/<hash>. Path param :id is exposed as $json.params.id on the downstream node.

nodes.name: Read GIF
nodes.notes: Reads /tmp/gmd-gifs/<id>.gif and stages it as a binary item under the 'data' key. Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs in n8n env.
